author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadySuggest
short: Suggestion board with anonymous voting and staff triage
description: A suggestion board where members submit ideas as clean embeds, the community votes with anonymous green/red buttons, and staff triage each suggestion (approve/deny/implemented). Features per-suggestion anonymous authoring, two hierarchy-minimum role gates (participants and staff), a vote-only role blocklist, separate submit/post/archive channels, public staff notes, and a role-locked reveal command that exposes the real author and voter lists to staff only.
install_msg:
ShadySuggest installed!

Setup (admins):
1. `[p]suggestset submitchannel #ideas`
2. `[p]suggestset postchannel #suggestions`
3. `[p]suggestset archivechannel #suggest-archive`
4. `[p]suggestset participantrole @Member` and `[p]suggestset staffrole @Moderator`
5. Optional: `[p]suggestset logchannel #suggest-log`, `[p]suggestset blocklist add @Muted`
6. `[p]suggestset enable`

Members submit with `/suggest`. Staff use `/suggestmod` and `/suggestreveal`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores suggestion text, the author's user ID (kept private when a suggestion is posted anonymously), and per-user vote records. Vote counts are shown publicly, but who voted and anonymous authorship are only visible to staff via the reveal command.
